en: Apin, are you home?
Yes, come on in.
Apin, are you home?

ab: Uka Apin lumaq ti, ma’aq is bazbaz. taqua i musuqis sin Apin.
ch: B:Apin不在家耶!有什麼事嗎? 回來我會轉告Apin。
en: Apin  is not at home. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.
Who are you?

ab: Bai, Abus sin Apin aam, indangazavan aam matua hilav.
ch: B:奶奶，我們是Abas 和 Apin，幫我們開門!
en: Grandma, we are Abas and Apin, please open the door for us.
Who is it?
I am vilian, I am here for Atul.
Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: Talmadin aas nii tu minsuma, minliskin ak su.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.
Apin, I am here to play with you.

ab: Kava’a mungkumbu lumaq. Malibuntu in mantala suu.
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: Inak aipi sinsuaz tu Hutan. Tanami maun.
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看!
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!
The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: Zain, inak aipi sinsuaz tu kaununkaunun, tanami maun.
ch: A:過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.
The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: Malungqua, inak aipi sinsuaz ni tu pundan iiu tu lamuqu, tanami maun.
ch: A:請坐! 這是我種的有機玉米吃看看!
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.
Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.
Do you want some oranges?

ab: Ni ak maqtu maun izuk. Sia nak lingqu tun qaunun.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.
Would you want some cookies?
Sure, I like it very much.
Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: Uningan, kaununkaunun i madia sa vus.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.
I will bring you some water.
Thank you.

ab: Pidiav maun, madia nak sinhanat pandian.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: Uu! Tutuza tu mahansum daingaz masihal sa qaunun.
ch: B:嗚! 真的很香也好吃。
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.
Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.
I’ll make myself at home then.
Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: Madia in nak kaunun, niin ak maqtu maun.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
